user_query: I'd rather do the ROM than the AGO. Change the activity on Day 3 to the ROM.

updates.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 3 > Art Gallery of Ontario

description.from: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.
description.to: Extensive natural history and world culture museum with diverse permanent and rotating exhibits, including dinosaur fossils and global artifacts. Indoor cultural experience suitable for a relaxed, educational visit.

updates.reasoning: Replaced the Art Gallery of Ontario POI with the Royal Ontario Museum (ROM) for Day 3, keeping the original 2-hour time block and travel method but updating all descriptive fields to reflect the ROM.
